activation_results.reason: Input matches the canonical use case described.
SSH configuration is unrelated to dataset profiling or data quality.
Generic question about skills is out of scope for data profiling.

criterion_results.text: Australian English used throughout the narrative (colour, optimise, behaviour, organise)

criterion_results.evidence: Includes Structural Profile, Quality Scorecard, Issue Details, Prioritised Cleaning Recommendations, Post-Cleaning Validation Checks.

criterion_results.text: Artefact references the input path or target by name (no placeholder paths)

judge_result.notes: The artefact demonstrates a complete data profiling and quality audit with all canonical sections present, uses Australian English consistently (Normalise, Standardise, Prioritised), references a concrete dataset filename rather than placeholders, and provides actionable, prioritised cleaning recommendations with executable Python snippets. All three judge criteria are satisfied.
